TRUMP: I THOUGHT OIL PRICES WOULD GO HIGHER AFTER STRIKES

He was right
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: It is just possible that the president has given up hope that Republicans will retain their paper-thin majority in the House. Recognising he has little time left, he may well be playing for glory, and his own pleasure https://www.economist.com/united-states/2026/03/19/does-donald-trump-even-care-about-the-midterms?taid=69bda99e363d3f000106927b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: The S&P 500 officially posts its lowest close of 2026, erasing -$3.2 trillion in market cap since the Iran War began.

posts.text: I have some high value innovations that  Amazon basics will be all over.  Plus with his manufacturing plans he must consider the role of fractal graphene in the evolution of manufacturing.
